messages.text: This ticket needs your approval before it can proceed. Reply here with "approve" to approve it.

messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
What it is: Ticket-topic reply falsely says 'Nothing to approve' for any non-keyword input
What it solves: ACCEPTANCE REVISED POST-APPROVAL (2026-07-15): the human approved this ticket,
then the coordinator caught a second occurrence (BL-414) that DISPROVED the
original post-write-race theory and directed the specifier (priority-00 note)
to re-spec before build. The user-visible defect is the SAME ("Not…
How it works: Approving a genuinely-pending ticket confirms success by name and never emits the generic 'nothing to approve' text
